text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
That's all. I'm sorry, but I don't think the way you've been having me
run is...

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I see... I'm sorry as well. It looks like I put you through a lot. And you,
young trainer—I must thank you for looking out for her when I could
not.
choice_data_list:
I'm counting on you to put her strengths to
good use.

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I do wish to do that... But you see, I'm quite set in my ways as a
trainer, and I'm afraid that I will cause her to feel trapped again.

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka, why don't you consider transferring your contract over to this
trainer?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Eh? A transfer?

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I know that way you'll get much more flexible guidance. I can see
that this trainer respects you very much, and that's a wonderful thing.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... W-would that be all right with you? I mean...
choice_data_list: If that's what you want, then I want it too!
If that's what you want, then I want it too!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Of course it's what I want! Thank you so much... Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Good for you, Suzuka! I can't wait to see the fine racer you are sure to
become.

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Just know that, should you ever take on any of my trainees, I'll be
cheering harder for them. I do hope you'll be ready.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um... I know that we just made things official, but what should we do
about the debut race I was supposed to run in next month?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka fidgets about nervously, but her eyes are full of fiery
determination. It wouldn't make sense to extinguish that.
choice_data_list: You can run in the race, just as planned.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, really? Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: In that case... what should we do about my running style?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I've come to understand that my runaway style comes with its risks.
And one day, I may no longer be able to keep myself in the lead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I can't deny that she's correct in her thinking. However...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I... need to run in the lead.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...I need to reach that place, even if it's just once more! I don't care
about anything else!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's so obsessed with being in the lead... In this respect, she already
possesses a strength that's second to none.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If there exists potential beyond the limits of Umamusume, then it
would be achieved by Suzuka!
choice_data_list: Let's stick to what you're good at.
Let's stick to what you're good at.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting out of the gate in the lead and not giving it up even once... I
let her know that it will be difficult, but by no means impossible.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: So that means... You believe in my running.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I'll prove that your faith is well-placed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a strategy set, we're ready to begin training for her debut race
in earnest.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Leading at the start of a race and not losing speed even in the latter
half... How can I achieve that?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I've been told that we have limited energy for speed, so we need to
run in a way that conserves it.
choice_data_list: We'll just have to up your energy reserves then.
We'll just have to up your energy reserves then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suggest ramp training as a way for her to strengthen both the
muscles that exert explosive force and those that govern stamina.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Ramp training? Understood. Although... I'm not sure if the academy
course is enough of a challenge.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Maybe we could... climb a mountain or something? What do you
think?
choice_data_list: (She looks serious about doing just that!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her passion thoroughly rekindled, Silence Suzuka continually
produces amazing results with every passing day of training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Until, at last...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, Air Groove! You decided to come watch me?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Yes, I've been a little worried about you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Heh, though that look on your face tells me that I didn't have much
cause for concern.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe. It's almost time for me to get on the track. See you soon.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Have a good run.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Clear blue skies greet a new group of emboldened Twinkle Series
hopefuls!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Each runner has entered her gate. Their debut race starts now!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Today's favorite to win, Silence Suzuka, takes an early lead, and with
unbelievable speed leaves everyone else behind.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
That Suzuka's incredible! Even as a front runner, that's some shocking
speed right from the get go!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but don't forget, this is the Twinkle Series! Can she really win
with that kind of meathead strategy?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (It's still... so noisy. I need to go farther!)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hngh!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Even in the last leg, Silence Suzuka increases her speed! She keeps
pulling away from the pack!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: No way... Can she really keep it up?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (I won't let anyone get in my way. I won't give up the lead!)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: This scenery... is mine alone!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka crosses the finish with seven lengths to spare! You
don't often see a front running performance like that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Woooooooo!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Unbelievable, Suzuka! You're an absolute monster!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, not quite.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: The views will surely only get better from here, Trainer!
